content.intro: RentGoose allows you to generate detailed rent statements for any date range, showing rent received, outstanding balances, and payment history across your properties.

sections.title: How to Generate a Rent Statement

steps.title: Navigate to RentGoose
steps.content: Open RentGoose from the sidebar beta section.

steps.title: Click the Properties Tab
steps.content: Select the Properties tab within RentGoose to see all properties with active rent schedules.

steps.title: Find the Property
steps.content: Search or scroll to find the property you want to produce a statement for.

steps.title: Click View
steps.content: Click 'View' to open the financial summary screen, which shows all rent schedules and payment history for that property.

steps.title: Select the Date Range
steps.content: Choose the date range for the statement — either a specific month or a full tax year. The statement will cover all rent activity within the selected period.

steps.title: Review the Statement
steps.content: The statement displays rent due, rent received, any outstanding balances, and payment dates for the selected period.

steps.title: Download as CSV
steps.content: Click Download to save the statement as a CSV file, suitable for your records or importing into accountancy software.

sections.title: Monthly and Annual Statements
sections.content: Monthly statements are useful for regular financial tracking. Annual statements covering the UK tax year (April to April) are available for self-assessment tax purposes.
